rationale: The citing paper is centered on formal media attribution and fixed-budget profit-maximizing allocation using random-effects probit models, whereas the cited paper focuses on within-site clickstream browsing dynamics via a hierarchical type II tobit model, suggesting only indirect topical overlap. Because the evidence provided is just a single DOI-matched reference with no in-text citation context, there is not enough information to confidently classify it as clearly substantive or clearly incidental.
